scripts.check: npm run validate:configs && npm run validate:model-assets:strict && npm run test:unit && npm run build && npm run validate:dist && npm run test:e2e:smoke
scripts.check:full: npm run check && npm run test:e2e:modular
scripts.ship: npm run promote && npm run check:full
scripts.sync: npm run sync:shop && npm run sync:projects && npm run sync:videos
scripts.sync:ci: node scripts/syncShopFeed.mjs --defaults-only && node scripts/syncProjectsFeed.mjs --defaults-only && node scripts/syncVideosFeed.mjs --defaults-only
scripts.sync:defaults: npm run sync:shop:defaults && npm run sync:projects:defaults && npm run sync:videos:defaults
scripts.test:e2e:modular: npm run test:e2e:modular:layout && npm run test:e2e:modular:rifle && npm run test:e2e:modular:screening
scripts.test:e2e:modular:layout: playwright test --config=playwright.config.mjs tests/e2e/modular-showcase.spec.mjs -g "south padre room is a static lobby annex with linked gallery screens and a new-tab portal|south padre gallery panels stay hidden behind neighboring room walls and appear inside SPI|back hallway is left empty for now|outdoor courtyard centers the horse and rifle without blocking the main path"
scripts.test:e2e:modular:rifle: playwright test --config=playwright.config.mjs tests/e2e/modular-showcase.spec.mjs -g "south padre rifle stays centered, rotates in place, and links to center-artifact emissive pulse"
scripts.test:e2e:modular:screening: npm run test:e2e:modular:screening:layout && npm run test:e2e:modular:screening:shell && npm run test:e2e:modular:screening:feed
scripts.test:e2e:modular:screening:layout: playwright test --config=playwright.config.mjs tests/e2e/modular-showcase.spec.mjs -g "screening hall keeps overflow in a single widened room instead of cloning south"
scripts.test:e2e:modular:screening:shell: playwright test --config=playwright.config.mjs tests/e2e/modular-showcase.spec.mjs -g "hidden screening shell walls stay collider-disabled after a catalog rebuild"
scripts.test:e2e:modular:screening:feed: playwright test --config=playwright.config.mjs tests/e2e/modular-showcase.spec.mjs -g "screening hall prefers the fresher default video feed over a stale local override"
